---
# title: Heidi Lantz
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
lightbox: true
---

<div class="centered-title">Heidi Lantz</div>
::: {.image-text-container}

::: {#fig-profile-picture}

![](outputs/norway_image.jpg){width=70% height=70% .lightbox}

Visiting the [*Gol Stave Church*](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gol_Stave_Church){target="_blank"} <br>
during my semester at the **University of Oslo**!
:::

<div>
## About Me

Hi, I'm Heidi! 
I'm a Data Modernization Consultant and am developing my skills to eventually become a Data Engineer.

I graduated with a BSc. at the University of British Columbia (*UBC*) in May 2025! I finished with a Major in **Statistics** & a Minor in **Data Science**.

I frequently work with Databricks, Microsoft Fabric, and Power BI using the Python, R, SQL, and DAX languages.
Please take a look through my website to learn more!

## Contact
**LinkedIn**: [linkedin.com/in/heidilantz/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/heidilantz/){target="_blank"} <br>
**Email**: [heidilantz22\@gmail.com](mailto:heidilantz22@gmail.com){.email} <br>
**GitHub**: [github.com/hlan22](https://github.com/hlan22){target="_blank"}
</div>
:::
